title: The Island Faces Destruction
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is the island faces destruction.
scene: The scene follows the island faces destruction, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why do DERE attacks hurt so much!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the big shots get wiped out, there's no hope left for any of us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are princess Shirahoshii and the others all right...?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Is the island really gonna be destroyed?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll protect them all?! Don't make me laugh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've got some nerve, I'll give you that, straw hat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If decken has really been eliminated ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you're right!! We can't let that happen ...not here!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If decken's ability cuts out right above fish-man Island, the result will be disastrous !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shira- Hosh!!!!!!!!?! You must change your course - head to the side-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't have you putting any funny ideas into her head!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It suits me just fine to have his power cut out here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hell, that's why I slaugh- Tered him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, right!! If we stay here, the ship's gonna fall right back down onto fish- man island where the others are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all the effort cry-hoshi put into leading it away....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bro-Hosh!! We have to go see cry- Hoshi, now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your crewmates are going to die, straw hat - I'll make sure of it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AHH!! Shirahoshii is heading off to one side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: that impertinent brat... she figured it out?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not letting you go anywhere near her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ughhh... my grip is barely strong enough!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get off me, straw hat!!! If the ship moves off course, the whole point of this endeavour is lost!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Curse that decken... Why isn't he dead yet?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as he has a single breath of life left in him, the ship won't start falling!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ship's started to drift off to the side!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Damn you, hody... damn you to hell...!! I'll never forgive you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't forget, you're still the target of my left hand ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll chase you down until you die a painful death...

summary: The Island Faces Destruction. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
